About Me

The Person Behind
the Portfolio

I'm Poorani R, a final-year BE Computer Science Engineering student at SNS College of Technology, Coimbatore — currently maintaining a GPA of 9.18 and interning at Monarch Softwares.

I sit at the intersection of AI, design, and software development — passionate about creating experiences that are not just functional, but beautiful and intuitive. From building multimodal AI web apps to designing Figma prototypes and automating workflows with n8n, I bring both technical depth and creative vision to everything I build.

Beyond the keyboard, I lead and engage with campus communities — as an Executive Member at RaC SNSCT and Regex, a Manager for the Authentic Dance Crew, and previously as Public Image Chair for the Rotaract Club, SNSCT.
